requirements.summary: Replace the Hero section subtitle text 'Professional eSports organization' with 'Professional Esports Tournament's App'
acceptanceCriteria: The selected element in the Hero section displays the text 'Professional Esports Tournament's App'
The text 'Professional eSports organization' no longer appears in that element
No other sections or components are altered

file_operations.description: Update the subtitle/tagline text node in the Hero section from 'Professional eSports organization' to 'Professional Esports Tournament's App'. Locate the text element corresponding to XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[1] and replace only that specific text content. Do not modify any other elements, styling, or layout.
